gold_sql: SELECT * FROM transaction_enose
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose ORDER BY date_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose ORDER BY date_time ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE type = 'greentea'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose WHERE type = 'greentea'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose WHERE device_id = 'e-nose_1'
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE value LIKE '%Class:Baik%'
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE value LIKE '%Multiclass:A%'
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE YEAR(date_time) = 2025 AND MONTH(date_time) = 2

SELECT MAX(date_time) AS transaksi_terakhir FROM transaction_enose
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE TIME(date_time) BETWEEN '10:00:00' AND '12:00:00'
SELECT MIN(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(value, 'Score:', -1), ',', 1) AS DECIMAL(5,2))) AS min_score FROM transaction_enose
SELECT device_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY device_id ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Class:Baik%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_baik, SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Cacat Mutu%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_cacat_mutu FROM transaction_enose

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Multiclass:A%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS A, SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Multiclass:B%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS B, SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Multiclass:C%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS C, SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Multiclass:D%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS D, SUM(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Multiclass:E%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS E FROM transaction_enose
SELECT type, AVG(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(value, 'Score:', -1), ',', 1) AS DECIMAL(5,2))) AS avg_score FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY type ORDER BY avg_score DESC
SELECT device_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY device_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DATE(date_time) AS tanggal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose WHERE device_id = 'e-nose_1' AND YEAR(date_time) = 2025 AND MONTH(date_time) = 7 GROUP BY tanggal ORDER BY tanggal
SELECT DATE(date_time) AS tanggal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY tanggal ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN value LIKE '%Cacat Mutu%' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS persen_cacat_mutu FROM transaction_enose
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date_time, '%Y-%m') AS bulan, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY bulan HAVING total > 20 ORDER BY bulan
SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE DATE(date_time) = (SELECT DATE(date_time) FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY DATE(date_time) ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)

gold_sql: SELECT MAX(detection_time) AS deteksi_terakhir FROM transaction_object_detection
SELECT MIN(value) AS min_objek FROM transaction_object_detection
SELECT type, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY type ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS jumlah_record FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY type ORDER BY jumlah_record DESC
SELECT DATE(detection_time) AS tanggal, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY tanggal ORDER BY tanggal
SELECT HOUR(detection_time) AS jam, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection WHERE DATE(detection_time) = '2025-02-19' GROUP BY jam ORDER BY jam
SELECT DATE(detection_time) AS tanggal, type, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY tanggal, type ORDER BY tanggal, type
SELECT type, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY type ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS jumlah_record FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY type ORDER BY jumlah_record DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT HOUR(detection_time) AS jam, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection WHERE type = 'people' GROUP BY jam ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT type, SUM(value) AS total, ROUND(SUM(value) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(value) FROM transaction_object_detection), 2) AS persentase FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY type ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT type, SUM(value) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection WHERE device_id = 'edge_1' GROUP BY type ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT DISTINCT device_id FROM transaction_enose WHERE device_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT device_id FROM transaction_object_detection)

SELECT tanggal, SUM(total) AS total_gabungan FROM (SELECT DATE(date_time) AS tanggal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_enose GROUP BY DATE(date_time) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(detection_time) AS tanggal, COUNT(*) AS total FROM transaction_object_detection GROUP BY DATE(detection_time)) AS gabungan GROUP BY tanggal ORDER BY tanggal
